arts.ttl: Danilo Set to Join Napoli After Weekend Clash with Juventus
arts.sum: Napoli are on the verge of securing the signature of Brazilian defender Danilo, with the deal expected to be finalized after the upcoming weekend. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the transfer will take place following the highly anticipated match between Napoli and Juventus, adding an intriguing subplot to an already crucial fixture. arts.sum: Club Brugge enter their upcoming Champions League match against Juventus with renewed defensive options after coach Nicky Hayen welcomed back Joaquin Seys from a hamstring injury.
